name: Acadian Asset Management Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a holding company that operates a systematic investment management business through our majority owned subsidiary, Acadian Asset Management LLC (Acadian LLC). With approximately $178 billion of assets under management as of December31, 2025, Acadian LLC offers institutional investors across the globe access to a diversified array of systematic investment strategies designed to meet a range of risk and return objectives.
